name: Santa María
eruptionHistory: The 1902 eruption was one of the largest of the 20th century (VEI 6). The Santiaguito dome complex has been actively erupting in its crater since 1922.
description: Santa María's devastating 1902 eruption was one of the four largest volcanic eruptions of the 20th century. Its crater now hosts the actively growing Santiaguito dome complex.
